prompt: This class fails to compile. What is the bug?
choices: Interfaces cannot have more than one abstract method
Square does not implement resize() — a class must implement every abstract method in the interface or be declared abstract itself
draw() must be declared as public abstract in the interface to be implementable
Square must call super.draw() inside its draw() implementation
explanation: A concrete class that implements an interface must provide an implementation for every abstract method. Square implements draw() but not resize(), so the compiler reports 'Square is not abstract and does not override abstract method resize(double) in Drawable'. Fix: implement resize(double factor) { this.side *= factor; }, or declare Square as abstract.
